title: Implement the deterministic headless fixed-tick runner
summary: Create a Node-runnable authoritative simulation loop with 30 TPS semantics, pause/speed stepping, explicit seed input and no dependency on DOM or wall clock.
acceptance: A CLI advances an exact requested number of ticks
Simulation output for the same seed/commands is repeatable in the same build
No ambient Math.random, Date.now or DOM dependency exists in sim-core
A million empty ticks complete without unbounded memory growth
